lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੈ ਚਰਪਟੁ ਸਤਿ ਸਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: bolai charapatt sat saroop |
lines.english: Says Charpat, God is the embodiment of Truth;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਤੰਤ ਮਹਿ ਰੇਖ ਨ ਰੂਪੁ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: param tant meh rekh na roop |5|
lines.english: the supreme essence of reality has no shape or form. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਪਾਖੰਡੀ ਜਰਾ ਨ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis paakhanddee jaraa na maranaa |
lines.english: Such a Paakhandi does not grow old or die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਹੈ ਧਿਆਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis antar rahai dhiaan |
lines.english: Night and day, he remains in deep inner meditation.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਜਿ ਉਲਟੇ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: so bairaagee ji ulatte braham |
lines.english: He alone is a Bairaagi, who turns himself toward God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਗਨ ਮੰਡਲ ਮਹਿ ਰੋਪੈ ਥੰਮੁ ॥
lines.translit: gagan manddal meh ropai tham |
lines.english: In the Tenth Gate, the sky of the mind, he erects his pillar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਮਰੈ ਮੰਦਾ ਕਿਉ ਜੀਵੈ ਜੁਗਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiau marai mandaa kiau jeevai jugat |
lines.english: How is evil eradicated? How can the true way of life be found?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮ ਤੰਤ ਮਹਿ ਰੇਖ ਨ ਰੂਪੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: param tant meh rekh na roop |6|
lines.english: the supreme essence of reality has no shape or form. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੋਲੈ ਭਰਥਰਿ ਸਤਿ ਸਰੂਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: bolai bharathar sat saroop |
lines.english: Says Bhart'har, God is the embodiment of Truth;

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਸਤ ਸਮਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: te bairaagee sat samaan |
lines.english: Such a Bairaagi is just like the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਅਖਰੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਹੈ ਹਿਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su akhar jit rahai hiaau |
lines.english: What is that Word, which holds the heart in its place?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਤਿ ਨਾਸਤਿ ਏਕੋ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aasat naasat eko naau |
lines.english: Throughout existence and non-existence, there is only the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਨ ਪੜਾਇ ਕਿਆ ਖਾਜੈ ਭੁਗਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: kan parraae kiaa khaajai bhugat |
lines.english: What is the use of piercing the ears, or begging for food?

lines.gurmukhi: ਛਿਅ ਵਰਤਾਰੇ ਵਰਤਹਿ ਪੂਤ ॥
lines.translit: chhia varataare varateh poot |
lines.english: The students follow the six systems.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੂਪ ਛਾਵ ਜੇ ਸਮ ਕਰਿ ਸਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhoop chhaav je sam kar sahai |
lines.english: When you look alike upon sunshine and shade,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: taa naanak aakhai gur ko kahai |
lines.english: says Nanak, then the Guru will speak to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰਿ ਜੋ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: nirankaar jo rahai samaae |
lines.english: One who remains absorbed in the Formless Lord

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਸੰਸਾਰੀ ਨਾ ਅਉਧੂਤ ॥
lines.translit: naa sansaaree naa aaudhoot |
lines.english: They are neither worldly people, nor detached renunciates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਹੇ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਮੰਗਣਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: kaahe bheekhiaa mangan jaae |7|
lines.english: - why should he go out begging? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਸੋਈ ਆਖੀਐ ਜਿਥਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har mandar soee aakheeai jithahu har jaataa |
lines.english: That alone is said to be the Lord's temple, where the Lord is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਨਸ ਦੇਹ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: maanas deh gur bachanee paaeaa sabh aatam raam pachhaataa |
lines.english: In the human body, the Guru's Word is found, when one understands that the Lord, the Supreme Soul, is in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਦਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਰ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਤਿਨੀ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh har mandar kee saar na jaananee tinee janam gavaataa |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh does not appreciate the value of the Lord's temple; they waste away and lose their lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਖੋਜੀਐ ਘਰ ਮਾਹਿ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: baahar mool na khojeeai ghar maeh bidhaataa |
lines.english: Don't look for Him outside your self. The Creator, the Architect of Destiny, is within the home of your own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਸੁਣੈ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਾ ਕਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh hovai so sunai moorakh kaa kahanaa |
lines.english: Only a fool listens to the words of the fool.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਾਈ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: sabh meh ik varatadaa gurasabadee paaeaa jaaee |12|
lines.english: The One Lord is pervading in all; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He can be found. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖੁ ਓਹੁ ਜਿ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਹੈ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੇ ਮਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh ohu ji mugadh hai ahankaare maranaa |
lines.english: A fool is stupid; he dies of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਰਖ ਕੇ ਕਿਆ ਲਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿਆ ਮੂਰਖ ਕਾ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: moorakh ke kiaa lakhan hai kiaa moorakh kaa karanaa |
lines.english: What are the signs of the fool? What does the fool do?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ਸੁ ਕਰੇ ਵੀਚਾਰੁ ਓਸੁ ਅਲਿਪਤੋ ਰਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh hoe su kare veechaar os alipato rahanaa |
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh contemplates the Lord, and remains detached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਤੁ ਕਮਾਣੈ ਸਦਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੁਖ ਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਰਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: et kamaanai sadaa dukh dukh hee meh rahanaa |
lines.english: His actions always bring him pain; he lives in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਪਵੈ ਖੂਹਿ ਕਿਹੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਕਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: at piaaraa pavai khoohi kihu sanjam karanaa |
lines.english: If someone's beloved friend falls into the pit, what can be used to pull him out?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪੈ ਆਪਿ ਉਧਰੈ ਓਸੁ ਪਿਛੈ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਭੀ ਤਰਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: har naam japai aap udharai os pichhai ddubade bhee taranaa |
lines.english: Chanting the Lord's Name, he saves himself, and he carries across those who are drowning as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋ ਕਰੇ ਜੋ ਦੇਇ ਸੁ ਸਹਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak jo tis bhaavai so kare jo dee su sahanaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, he acts in accordance with the Will of God; he endures whatever he is given. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਆਖੈ ਰੇ ਮਨਾ ਸੁਣੀਐ ਸਿਖ ਸਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: naanak aakhai re manaa suneeai sikh sahee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, listen, O mind, to the True Teachings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਖਾ ਰਬੁ ਮੰਗੇਸੀਆ ਬੈਠਾ ਕਢਿ ਵਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: lekhaa rab mangeseea baitthaa kadt vahee |
lines.english: Opening His ledger, God will call you to account.

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜਰਾਈਲੁ ਫਰੇਸਤਾ ਹੋਸੀ ਆਇ ਤਈ ॥
lines.translit: ajaraaeel faresataa hosee aae tee |
lines.english: Azraa-eel, the Angel of Death, shall be appointed to punish them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਲਬਾ ਪਉਸਨਿ ਆਕੀਆ ਬਾਕੀ ਜਿਨਾ ਰਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: talabaa pausan aakeea baakee jinaa rahee |
lines.english: Those rebels who have unpaid accounts shall be called out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜ ਨਿਖੁਟੇ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਓੜਕਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: koorr nikhutte naanakaa orrak sach rahee |2|
lines.english: Falsehood will come to an end, O Nanak, and Truth will prevail in the end. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣੁ ਨ ਸੁਝਈ ਭੀੜੀ ਗਲੀ ਫਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan na sujhee bheerree galee fahee |
lines.english: They will find no way to escape coming and going in reincarnation; they are trapped in the narrow path.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa sabh sareer hai har rav rahiaa sabh aapai |
lines.english: The body and everything belongs to the Lord; the Lord Himself is all-pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਨਾ ਪਵੈ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee keemat naa pavai kichh kehan na jaapai |
lines.english: The Lord's value cannot be estimated; nothing can be said about it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee saalaaheeai har bhagatee raapai |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one praises the Lord, imbued with feelings of devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇਆ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ਗਵਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh man tan hariaa hoeaa ahankaar gavaapai |
lines.english: The mind and body are totally rejuvenated, and egotism is eradicated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੰਸਰ ਦਾਨ ਦੇ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੁ ਰੋਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sahansar daan de indru roaaeaa |
lines.english: Branded with a thousand marks of disgrace, Indra cried in shame.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕੁ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਿਸੈ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh har kaa khel hai guramukh kisai bujhaaee |13|
lines.english: Everything is the play of the Lord. The Gurmukh understands this. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਸ ਰਾਮੁ ਰੋਵੈ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: paras raam rovai ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: Paras Raam returned home crying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸੀ ਦਰਗਹ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aisee daragah milai sajaae |
lines.english: Such is the punishment received in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਜੈ ਸੁ ਰੋਵੈ ਭੀਖਿਆ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: ajai su rovai bheekhiaa khaae |
lines.english: Ajai cried and wept, when he was made to eat the manure he had given, pretending it was charity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਵੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਨਿਕਾਲਾ ਭਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: rovai raam nikaalaa bheaa |
lines.english: Rama wept when he was sent into exile,
